task_comp_comp_001_p1.description:
PHASE 1: Implement Constants (src/config.py)
Centralizes all game configuration parameters, including screen dimensions, frame rates, color constants, player speed, enemy spawn rates, and scoring mechanics. It acts as the single source of truth for tuning game balance and appearance without modifying core logic.

REQUIRED PUBLIC INTERFACE:
Constants: SCREEN_WIDTH: int = 800, SCREEN_HEIGHT: int = 600, FPS: int = 60, PLAYER_SPEED: float = 5.0, ENEMY_SPEED: float = 2.0, BULLET_SPEED: float = 7.0, WHITE: tuple[int, int, int] = (255, 255, 255), BLACK: tuple[int, int, int] = (0, 0, 0), RED: tuple[int, int, int] = (255, 0, 0)

task_comp_comp_002_p1.description:
PHASE 1: Implement GameData (src/models.py)
Defines data structures using Python dataclasses for game entities such as Player, Enemy, and Bullet. These models serve as the serialization layer and shared state object for the ECS pattern, ensuring consistent data representation across the game's systems.

REQUIRED PUBLIC INTERFACE:
Classes: EntityState
Functions:
  EntityState.__init__(self, x: float, y: float, width: int, height: int) -> None

task_comp_comp_013_p1.description:
PHASE 1: Implement InputHandler (src/systems/input.py)
Decouples input processing from the main engine. It translates raw pygame events into game-specific actions, such as player movement vectors or firing commands.

REQUIRED PUBLIC INTERFACE:
Classes: InputHandler
Functions:
  InputHandler.get_input() -> dict[str, bool]
  InputHandler.is_quit_event(event: pygame.event.Event) -> bool

task_comp_comp_009_p1.description:
PHASE 1: Implement ScoreManager (src/managers/score_manager.py)
Tracks the player's score throughout the session and handles rendering the score display to the screen, providing methods to increment points and reset the counter.

REQUIRED PUBLIC INTERFACE:
Classes: ScoreManager
Functions:
  ScoreManager.__init__(self) -> None
  ScoreManager.add_score(self, amount: int) -> None
  ScoreManager.draw(self, surface: pygame.Surface) -> None
  ScoreManager.score: int

task_comp_comp_010_p1.description:
PHASE 1: Implement UIComponents (src/ui/components.py)
Provides utility methods for rendering text, game over screens, and other non-entity user interface elements to the screen surface.

REQUIRED PUBLIC INTERFACE:
Functions:
  draw_text(surface: pygame.Surface, text: str, size: int, x: int, y: int) -> None
  draw_game_over(surface: pygame.Surface, score: int) -> None

task_comp_comp_012_p1.description:
PHASE 1: Implement ResourceManager (src/managers/resource_manager.py)
Caches game assets such as images and audio files to prevent redundant disk I/O. It provides a centralized interface for retrieving pre-loaded surfaces and sounds required by entities.

REQUIRED PUBLIC INTERFACE:
Classes: ResourceManager
Functions:
  ResourceManager.load_image(self, path: str) -> pygame.Surface
  ResourceManager.load_sound(self, path: str) -> pygame.mixer.Sound

task_comp_comp_003_p1.description:
PHASE 1: Implement BaseSprite (src/entities/base.py)
Provides an abstract base class for all game entities by extending pygame.sprite.Sprite. It integrates common functionality like position tracking and surface rendering, ensuring that all game objects can be managed by pygame sprite groups.

REQUIRED PUBLIC INTERFACE:
Classes: BaseEntity
Functions:
  BaseEntity.__init__(self, x: float, y: float, image_path: str = None) -> None
  BaseEntity.update(self) -> None

task_comp_comp_005_p1.description:
PHASE 1: Implement Bullet (src/entities/bullet.py)
Defines projectile entities fired by the player, responsible for moving upward and removing themselves from the game world once they leave the screen bounds or impact a target.

REQUIRED PUBLIC INTERFACE:
Classes: Bullet
Functions:
  Bullet.__init__(self, x: float, y: float) -> None
  Bullet.update(self) -> None

task_comp_comp_006_p1.description:
PHASE 1: Implement Enemy (src/entities/enemy.py)
Represents hostile alien ships that descend down the screen. It manages enemy-specific logic like movement patterns and identifying when the enemy has reached the bottom or been destroyed.

REQUIRED PUBLIC INTERFACE:
Classes: Enemy
Functions:
  Enemy.__init__(self, x: float, y: float) -> None
  Enemy.update(self) -> None

task_comp_comp_004_p1.description:
PHASE 1: Implement Player (src/entities/player.py)
Represents the user-controlled spaceship, handling input detection and movement constraints within the game screen boundaries. It maintains the current state of the player, including health and shooting capability, and interfaces with the bullet factory.

REQUIRED PUBLIC INTERFACE:
Classes: Player
Functions:
  Player.__init__(self, x: float, y: float) -> None
  Player.move(self, dx: float, dy: float) -> None
  Player.shoot(self) -> Bullet

task_comp_comp_007_p1.description:
PHASE 1: Implement EntityManager (src/managers/entity_manager.py)
Acts as the controller for all sprite groups in the game, facilitating mass updates, rendering, and lifecycle management for player, enemy, and bullet entities.

REQUIRED PUBLIC INTERFACE:
Classes: EntityManager
Functions:
  EntityManager.__init__(self) -> None
  EntityManager.add_enemy(self, enemy: Enemy) -> None
  EntityManager.update_all(self) -> None
  EntityManager.draw_all(self, surface: pygame.Surface) -> None

task_comp_comp_008_p1.description:
PHASE 1: Implement CollisionSystem (src/systems/collision.py)
Handles the physics interactions between entities, specifically checking for bullet-enemy and player-enemy collisions using pygame's sprite collision masks. It updates score and entity health through direct orchestration with the ScoreManager.

REQUIRED PUBLIC INTERFACE:
Classes: CollisionSystem
Functions:
  CollisionSystem.__init__(self) -> None
  CollisionSystem.check_collisions(self, player: Player, enemies: pygame.sprite.Group, bullets: pygame.sprite.Group, score_manager: ScoreManager) -> int

task_comp_comp_011_p1.description:
PHASE 1: Implement GameEngine (src/engine.py)
The main controller class that initializes pygame, handles the primary game loop, processes inputs, updates the game state, and coordinates between managers for a seamless gaming experience.

REQUIRED PUBLIC INTERFACE:
Classes: Game
Functions:
  Game.__init__(self) -> None
  Game.run(self) -> None
  Game.handle_events(self) -> None
  Game.update(self, dt: float) -> None
  Game.render(self) -> None
  Game.is_game_over: bool

task_integration_test.description: Final integration: final build check and smoke tests
